title: Voidit End Expansion (End Update)
description: Adds a brand new End ore - Voidit - with tools forged from the power of the void! (End Update)
body:
# 🌌 Voidit
With this mod, the End becomes a whole new adventure! Mine Voidit Ore to craft powerful gear that surpasses Netherite and explore the End like never before.

# ✨ Features
- Voidit Ore spawns in the outer End islands
- Smelt into Voidit Ingots for crafting
- Voidit Pickaxe faster and stronger than Netherite
- Voidit Sword deals higher damage than Netherite
- Voidit Armor offers superior protection and knockback resistance

More tools, armor, achievements and blocks coming soon 😱

**Please give me your feedback [here](https://lostgpu.netlify.app/feedback).**
